mgmd.multicast-vpn: ${vpn\-name} <#if unmatched\-membership\-report\-processing == 'discard'> unmatched-mgmd-report-discard <#elseif unmatched\-membership\-report\-processing == 'forward'> unmatched-mgmd-report-forward <#elseif unmatched\-membership\-report\-processing == 'snoop-or-proxy'> unmatched-mgmd-report-snoop-or-proxy </#if> <#if network\-interface\-for\-unmatched\-reports?has_content && unmatched\-membership\-report\-processing == 'snoop-or-proxy'> ${network\-interface\-for\-unmatched\-reports} </#if>
